result.reason: Users experience a white screen when connecting via VNC, indicating a rendering or connection display issue.
result.approach: Investigate the VNC rendering pipeline in ConnectionWindow.cs and ProtocolVNC.cs to identify why the remote display is not being rendered. Focus on initialization, update mechanisms, and error handling of the VNC client component.
